title: dsewerek's perfected
description: ✨ a vanilla+ modpack focused on 🚀 performance, 👁️ visuals, and 🎮 quality-of-life tweaks — making minecraft feel smoother, cleaner, and more polished without touching the core game.
body:
dsewerek's perfected is my personal take on what vanilla minecraft should feel like. 🎯 no crazy overhauls, no tech trees, no magic systems — just the game you know, but actually fixed. built for Fabric 1.21.1, client & server compatible. 🧵

---

## 🚀 what's the point?

vanilla minecraft is great, but let's be real — it's got issues. stuttery fps, ugly default lighting, menus that feel ancient, and a dozen little annoyances that add up fast. this pack fixes all of that while keeping the game feeling like minecraft. (ง •_•)ง

---

## ⚙️ what's included?

- **🏎️ performance** — significant fps boosts via optimization mods like Sodium, Lithium, and FerriteCore. expect a noticeably smoother experience even on mid-range hardware. ( •̀ᴗ•́ )و
- **👁️ visuals** — enhanced lighting, better textures, smoother animations, and optional shader support via Iris. the game just looks better. (⌐■_■)
- **🎮 quality-of-life** — smarter inventory management, better tooltips, improved HUD, and small tweaks that make everyday gameplay feel polished and intentional. (•̀ᴗ•́)
- **🌐 multiplayer-ready** — fully compatible with multiplayer servers. play solo or hop on a server with friends without any issues. \o/

---

## 💡 shaders — optional!

shaders are included but totally optional. 🖥️ if your pc can't handle them, just turn them off — the pack still looks and runs great without them. the goal is flexibility, not forcing you into lag. ¯\_(ツ)_/¯

---

## 🙋 who is this for?

- new players who want a clean, smooth first experience 🌱 o(>ω<)o
- returning players who want vanilla but better 🔁 ( ͡° ͜ʖ ͡°)
- anyone tired of vanilla feeling rough around the edges ✨ (╯°□°）╯

---

## 📌 credits

inspired by the **Vanilla Perfected** concept by **demonjoeTV** 🎥, but customized to match my personal vision of what a clean, optimized minecraft experience should look like.

if you enjoy it, leave a ⭐ — it genuinely helps! 💙 (´ ▽ ` )
